## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance and optimization strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance metrics show strong growth: 221+ published pieces, 43% increase in clicks, 6k+ new impressions](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Next steps: Add alt text to feature images, analyze lead generation data, optimize CTAs and page structure](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Discern to set up proper conversion tracking in Google Analytics for better data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [221+ published pieces as of yesterday, with more added this morning](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Week-over-week growth: \~10% increase in clicks, \~6% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [438 clicks on resource pages, forming the majority of site clicks](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Stable CTR week-over-week, improving average position for pieces](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Top performing pages maintaining consistent rankings](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Website Optimization Strategies

  - [Discussion on best practices for resource page endings and website improvements](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Suggestion to analyze which blog posts are successfully driving leads](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Potential integration of more lead magnets and CTAs throughout content](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Consideration of seasonality and state-specific deadlines for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Proposal to add more CTAs throughout pages, especially for chunked content](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Lead Tracking and Conversion Analysis

  - [Current lead booking tool: Default (calendar/workflow tool)](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Lead enrichment using APIs like Sixth Sense and Clearbit](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [No current heat mapping or engagement tracking on resource pages](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Need to set up proper conversion tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Plan to export and analyze lead generation data per blog post](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Focus on brand exercise rather than conversion-focused approach](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Importance of producing good content over driving demo bookings](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Discussion on potential content refreshes and republishing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Consideration of concise vs. detailed content based on user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to set up and verify conversion tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Export and share lead generation data with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze lead data and propose optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Add alt text to feature images for previously published content](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance metrics and adjusting strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/UyFtEmmMozQ_wTz51rkxeR1yiQzTDyhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
